pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which dynamically generates the briefing text at this exact path.
Verified via the task description and export_result.sh which explicitly checks for the report at this path.
Verified via export_result.sh which outputs the evaluation JSON to this path, and verifier.py which reads from it.

Verified by extracting the physical limits from the briefing (45 deg, 12 m/s, 2.5 m/s^2, 15 m/s, 5 m, 1.0) and converting them to ArduPilot's native parameter units via ArduPilot documentation (ANGLE_MAX in centi-degrees, WPNAV_SPEED in cm/s, WPNAV_ACCEL in cm/s^2, RTL_SPEED in cm/s, RTL_ALT in cm, and FS_EKF_THRESH as unitless).
Verified via ArduPilot documentation and source code defaults; SYSID_THISMAV is 1 for default vehicles unless overridden by the network.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data via a dynamically created briefing document. It has been verified that the required ArduPilot parameter transformations exactly match the official ArduPilot documentation: 45 degrees translates to ANGLE_MAX 4500 (centi-degrees); 12 m/s translates to WPNAV_SPEED 1200 (cm/s); 2.5 m/s^2 translates to WPNAV_ACCEL 250 (cm/s/s); 15 m/s translates to RTL_SPEED 1500 (cm/s); and 5 m translates to RTL_ALT 500 (cm). The EKF Failsafe threshold is unitless (1.0). The default expected vehicle MAVLink ID (SYSID_THISMAV) is strictly 1.
